NOTE:POS ON 2 PLTFFS IN ONE FORM.
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A MANDARIN INTERPRETER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHENG, ZHONG JIN, RONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOU, CHARLES CHOU, KEN $100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CHOU, CHARLES CHOU, KEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ZHENG, ZHONG JIN, RONG STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHOU, CHARLES CHOU, KEN
